title: Joby Aviation Inc (JOBY) Q4 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Expect
text: Joby Aviation is scheduled to announce Q4 2024 earnings on February 26, 2025. Analysts anticipate the company will report quarterly revenue of $0.05 million with earnings of -$0.20 per share. For the complete 2024 fiscal year, the company is projected to generate $0.39 million in revenue with a loss of -$0.73 per share. Over the past 90 days, analyst projections for full-year 2024 revenue were raised from $0.25 million to $0.39 million. However, 2025 revenue estimates remained unchanged at $25.00 million, with earnings projected at -$0.74 per share. In Q3 2024, Joby reported $0.03 million in revenue, falling short of the expected $0.04 million. Five analysts covering the stock have set an average 12-month price target of $8.50.
